title: Connecticut General Statutes § 53a-40c — Psychological counseling required for person convicted of sexual assault of a minor
text: Any person convicted of a violation of section 53a-70, 53a-70a, 53a-71, 53a-72a, 53a-72b or 53a-73a where the victim of the sexual assault was a person ten years of age or under shall, in addition to any fine or term of imprisonment imposed, be sentenced to undergo psychological counseling.
